problem.description: Write a reusable CP-SAT Python solver for job-shop benchmark ta51. It has 50 jobs, 15 machines, and 750 operations. The solver may use OR-Tools CP-SAT modeling, hints, decomposition, repair, or hybrid exact-search control, but it must return a valid job_shop_lib.Schedule. The scorer rewards low makespan.
